code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
mut total = 0
mut i = 0
mut stop = false
while i < parts.len() and not stop
  let tok = match parts.get(i)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if total + n > 100
    stop = true
  else
    total = total + n
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("total=#{total}")
